description: Use this API to change the value of a CON of a load related model at a specified load or subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = change_ldmod_con(ibus, id, name, j, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_ldmod_con(ibus, id, name, j, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus, owner, zone or area number. ignored when an all type load model is specified (unless an all type load model is specified). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Load identifier, or “*” if the model is applied to all loads in the subsystem. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Con number to change relative to the start of the block of cons assigned to this model (1 for con(j), 2 for con(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New con value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: model NAME is not a load-related model.
no <subsystem type> type <load type> model for this id in tables for <subsystem type> IBUS.
no all type <load type> model for this id in tables.
<subsystem type> <load type> model for this id for <subsystem type> IBUS is aaa not xxx.
all type <load type> model for this id is aaa not xxx.
no CONs used in model NAME.
CON number outside of the CON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
